initiatives.name: 7th St Collective
initiatives.description: a qtbipoc centered collective rooted in autonomous organizing & mutual aid.

initiatives.name: Care Culture Collaborative
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering community care and support in Long Beach. They coordinate resource distribution, solidarity networks, and direct assistance while building power through collective organizing and creating spaces for community empowerment.

initiatives.name: Oral History and Popular Memory Project
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through oral history and cultural preservation in Long Beach. They coordinate storytelling initiatives, community archives, and solidarity networks while building power through collective memory, cultural organizing, and creating spaces for community narratives and historical justice.

initiatives.name: SURJ Long Beach
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Long Beach. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Long Beach Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Food, clothing, and hygiene distribution every Sunday.
